mainTitle: Claude 4: Next-Generation AI with Extended Thinking

features.title: World's Best Coding Model
features.description: Claude Opus 4 leads as the world's best coding model, achieving 72.5% on SWE-bench and 43.2% on Terminal-bench. It excels at complex, long-running coding tasks and agent workflows, maintaining sustained performance for hours on end-to-end development solutions.
features.imageAlt: Illustration of advanced coding capabilities with Claude 4

subPoints.title: Extended Thinking with Tool Use
subPoints.text: Claude 4 models can alternate between reasoning and tool use during extended thinking, using web search and other tools to improve responses. This hybrid approach delivers both near-instant responses and deeper reasoning capabilities.

subPoints.title: Enhanced Memory Capabilities
subPoints.text: When given access to local files, Claude 4 creates and maintains 'memory files' to store key information, unlocking better long-term task awareness, coherence, and performance on complex agent tasks.

features.title: Parallel Tool Execution & Precision
features.description: Claude 4 models can use multiple tools simultaneously, delivering enhanced efficiency and precision. With 65% fewer shortcuts and loopholes compared to previous models, Claude 4 follows instructions more accurately and provides more reliable results for complex workflows and agent tasks.
features.imageAlt: Illustration of parallel tool execution with Claude 4

features.title: Claude Code: Seamless Development Integration
features.description: Claude Code is now generally available with native VS Code and JetBrains integrations. Experience seamless pair programming with inline edits, background GitHub Actions, and the extensible Claude Code SDK for building custom agents and applications.
features.imageAlt: Illustration of Claude Code integration in development environments

features.title: Sustained Performance on Complex Tasks
features.description: Claude Opus 4 delivers sustained performance on long-running tasks requiring thousands of steps and several hours of focused effort. This capability dramatically expands what AI agents can accomplish, making it ideal for complex research, analysis, and multi-step problem solving.
features.imageAlt: Illustration of sustained performance on complex tasks

features.title: Hybrid Reasoning: Speed Meets Depth
features.description: Claude 4 models offer dual modes - near-instant responses for quick queries and extended thinking (up to 64K tokens) for complex reasoning. This flexibility ensures optimal performance whether you need rapid assistance or deep analytical thinking for challenging problems.
